metadata.climate_notes: Mild temperate oceanic - frost rare, moderate rainfall year-round, humidity can be high
metadata.curated_from: Horticultural knowledge, cross-referenced with Kings Seeds NZ catalog (244 cut flower varieties found)

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Cut when flowers are nearly fully open and stems are firm. Remove lower foliage. Excellent vase life, improves in fresh water daily.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Purple Prince, Benary Giant series, Queen Lime, State Fair
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Powdery mildew common in Auckland humidity - ensure good air circulation. Watch for aphids and two-spotted mite.

flowers.soil_type: poor to average, well-draining (too rich = more foliage, fewer flowers)
flowers.cut_flower_notes: Cut when buds just open. Dip stem ends in boiling water for 10 seconds to help uptake. Good filler flower.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Sensation Mixed, Sea Shells, Psyche, Double Click
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Generally hardy in Auckland. Earwigs may damage buds. Watch for slugs on young seedlings.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: The king of cut flowers - superb fragrance and vase life. Pick early morning. Place in cool water. Excellent scent variety.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Mammoth Mixed, Spencer Mix, Cupani (heirloom), Painted Lady
flowers.pest_disease_notes: In Auckland, sow in autumn for winter growth and spring flowering. Slugs are main pest. Powdery mildew in late season heat.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Cut when 3/4 open. Sear stem ends in boiling water or dip in alum powder. Dahlias are among the most versatile cut flowers for Auckland.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Cafe au Lait, Bishop of Llandaff, Kelvin Floodlight, Pom-Pom mixes
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Slugs and snails eat tubers and young shoots. Two-spotted mite in Auckland summers. Tuber rot in waterlogged soil.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Cut when petals just begin to open. Excellent vase life. Pollen-free varieties are essential for cut flower use.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Sunrich series (pollen-free), ProCut series, Italian White, Chianti
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Aphids on buds. Birds may pull up seedlings. Generally easy in Auckland. Succession sow every 2-3 weeks.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Classic cut flower with excellent vase life. Cut when 1-2 florets open. Remove top florets for more compact bouquet look.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Peter Pearce, Green Star, Espresso, Priscilla, Robinetta series
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Thrips are worst enemy in Auckland - they corms in storage and damage flowers. Keep soil well-drained. Corms may need lifting and storing in wet winters.

flowers.soil_type: well-draining, sandy loam, high organic matter
flowers.cut_flower_notes: Exceptional vase life - one of the longest-lasting cut flowers. Rose-like appearance. Very high commercial value.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Echo series, Mariachi series, Flare series, Champagne
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Damping-off is major risk for seedlings. Auckland humidity makes fungal diseases likely. Grow on benches if possible. Fusarium wilt in poorly drained soil.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Exceptional beauty with peony-like blooms and long vase life. Cut when buds just show colour but not fully open.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Tecolote series, Bloomingdale, Ranofix Double Mix, Elegance
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Corms rot in wet Auckland winter soil. Consider growing in raised beds or pots. Soak corms before planting. Botrytis in high humidity.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Poppies of the flower world. Excellent vase life, striking colours. Cut when petals begin to open. Handle with care - petals bruise easily.
flowers.auckland_varieties: De Caen Mix, Mount Everest (white), Lord Lieutenant, Bicolor series
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Same as Ranunculus - wet soil kills corms. Raised beds essential in Auckland. Mice may eat corms.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Incredible fragrance - one of the most scented cut flowers. Cut when first floret opens. Classic bridal flower.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Kings Seeds Double Mix, Pinnacle series, Blue Heaven, Golden Wave
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Needs cool winters to bloom well - Auckland's mild climate usually fine, but very warm winters can reduce flowering.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Outstanding vase life - one of the longest-lasting. Cut when buds show colour. Excellent for autumn bouquets.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Decorative types (Pink Muppet, Yellow Star), Spray varieties, Pompon types
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Aphids on buds and new growth. Powdery mildew in Auckland humidity. Rust common. Plant in well-ventilated positions.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Excellent vertical element in bouquets. Cut when 1/3 of florets are open. Top bud often doesn't open - can be removed.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Snapshot series, Madame Butterfly, Potomac series (extra-long stems), Rocket
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Rust is common in Auckland - avoid overhead watering. Snails and slugs on young plants. Generally easy to grow.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Cheerful cut flower with good vase life. Also medicinal. Self-seeds readily in Auckland gardens.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Kings Seeds Citrus Cocktail, Pacific Beauty, Radio Orange
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Very easy in Auckland. May get powdery mildew in humid summers but rarely severe. Self-seeds prolifically.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Spectacular vertical blooms. May need staking in Auckland wind. Cut when 1/3-1/2 of florets are open.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Pacific Giant, Blue Jay, Black Knight, Astolat
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Needs protection from Auckland hot afternoon sun. Crown rot in wet soil. Slugs on new growth. Second flush of flowers after cutting.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Exceptional fresh and dried vase life. Classic filler for arrangements. Does not wilt - retains colour for months when dried.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Pastel Mix, Deep Blue, Iceberg White, Salmon
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Very easy in Auckland. Drought-tolerant once established. No major pest issues.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Drama in a vase. Excellent vase life and dries well. Plume types are best for cutting - Crested (cockscomb) type is shorter.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Fresh Look series, Forest Fire, Century Mix, Dragon Breath
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Loves Auckland summer heat. Easy to grow. May get leaf spot in very humid conditions.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Ethereal blue flowers and attractive seed pods. Shorter vase life but worth growing for the charm. Pods useful dried.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Persian Jewels, Miss Jekyll Mixed, Delft Blue
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Very easy. Self-seeds prolifically in Auckland. Dislikes root disturbance - direct sow only.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Strongly fragrant. Cut when 1/3 of flowers open. Good filler. Can become invasive - check before planting.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Dwarf varieties are best: Miss Pearl, Buzz series
flowers.pest_disease_notes: In Auckland, grows like a weed. May need aggressive pruning. Watch for spider mite in dry periods.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Rustic charm in mixed bouquets. Seed heads attractive dried and fresh. Medicinal bonus.
flowers.auckland_varieties: White Swan, Magnus, Green Jewel, Cheyenne Spirit
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Very hardy in Auckland. Deer and rabbit resistant. May get aphids on flower buds. Tolerates Auckland humidity well.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Golden cheerful flowers. Good bulk filler in arrangements. Seed heads attractive for dried arrangements.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Denver Daisy, Indian Summer, Cherokee Sunset, Irish Eyes
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Powdery mildew in Auckland humidity. Good air flow essential. Relatively pest-free otherwise.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Excellent dried flower. Also good fresh. Cut before flowers fully open - they continue to open in vase.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Golden Everlasting (NZ native), Bikini Bikini, Mohave series
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Native to Australia - thrives in Auckland's warm climate. Very easy. May get leaf spot in wet periods.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Intensely fragrant - fills a room. Excellent spring cut flower. Classic bridal bouquet flower.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Cinderella series, Iron series, Goliath
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Needs cool temperatures for flowering - Auckland's mild winters are suitable but a warm winter reduces bloom. Clubroot can affect brassica-family plants.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Classic cottage garden. Dislikes root disturbance - direct sow. Good filler for informal arrangements.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Blue Boy, Red Boy, Black Ball, Florence Pink
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Very easy in Auckland. Self-seeds freely. Dislikes root disturbance.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Elegant spires similar to Delphinium but easier to grow (annual). Excellent for cottage-style arrangements.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Sublime series (F1 hybrids), Imperial Mixed, Pink Rose
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Needs cool weather to establish. Direct sow in Auckland autumn for spring flowering. Slugs on seedlings.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Pincushion flowers with excellent textural appeal. Butterfly magnet. Delicate and romantic in arrangements.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Tall Double Mix, Fire King, Moon Dance
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Fairly easy in Auckland. May need staking in exposed positions. Slower to start than some annuals.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Professional favourite - essential chartreuse filler for high-end arrangements. Excellent vase life. Self-supporting stems.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Greenout
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Very easy. Heat and drought tolerant. Excellent for Auckland summers.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Elegant white umbellifers - like baby's breath but taller and grander. The ultimate cottage garden filler.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Standard Ammi majus
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Very easy in Auckland. Self-seeds readily. Aphids may appear but natural predators handle them.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Unbeatable vase life - up to 3 weeks! Also excellent dried. Globe-shaped flowers add unique texture.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Ping Pong series, Strawberry Fields, Fireworks, Nana Compacta
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Heat loving - thrives in Auckland summers. Very pest and disease resistant. Drought tolerant once established.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Sweetly scented classic. Long vase life. Tight clusters of flowers make excellent short arrangements.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Sooty series (dark colours), Aurora, Amazon series
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Needs alkaline soil - add lime in Auckland (tends to be slightly acidic). Fusarium in poorly drained soils.

flowers.cut_flower_notes: Fast-growing, elegant hollyhock-like flowers. Good filler with beautiful translucent petals.
flowers.auckland_varieties: Silver Cup, Blushing Beauty, Mont Blanc
flowers.pest_disease_notes: Hollyhock rust is common in Auckland humidity. Grow away from hollyhocks to avoid cross-infection. Otherwise easy.
